title: Rechargeable LED Head Torch, 100000 High Lumens Head Torch Super Bright with 5 Modes, IPX7 Waterproof, 90° Adjustable, Zoomable Head Lamp Flashlight for Outdoor Camping, Running, Hiking
features: 【Super Bright Head Torch 100000 Lumens & Long Life】: This rechargeable head torch with a zoomable function boasts a powerful LED chip with a lifespan of 1000000 hours and an impressive light intensity of up to 100000 lumens, illuminating up to 1000 meters away for extended periods of time due to its high-capacity batteries with a run time of 6-12 hours.

【90 ° Adjustable & 5 Modes Choice】: LED rechargeable head torch with 90° adjustability and 5 light modes that include high, medium, low, strobe, and SOS features, Just press switch button 3-5S to power off when in any lights, Additionally, it sports a zoomable function, a red backlight, and front-to-back illumination.

【USB Charging & Power Output】: The head torch is designed with USB charging and power output, ensuring easy and convenient charging while on the go. the camping head torch USB output is designed to be used as an emergency power source to charge smartphones, PCs or other devices.

【IPX6 Waterproof & Durable】: IPX6 waterproof head torch, this head lamp can withstand heavy rain and withstand harsh environments such as high temperatures or extreme cold weather making it suitable for outdoor activities such as camping, hiking, running, or fishing etcs.

【Zoomable Headlamp】: The hand flashlight features a telescoping zoom. Pulling back the head of the running head torch switches it to floodlight mode, and pulling the head forward switches it to spotlight mode. While using a head torch, the spotlight mode is best for long-distance lighting while the floodlight mode is best for headlamp wide-range lighting.

【Comfortable Head Lights for Forehead】: The body of the super bright headlamp is made of high-quality aluminum, no heavy feeling when using the head torch.The head torch sits comfortably on the forehead, leaving your hands to do any task, such as cooking or repairing a car.

【Best Nighttime Headlight】: Our head torch are perfect for adults who need hands lighting during nighttime activities. Whether you're an outdoor enthusiast or an indoor worker, this rechargeable head torch is a great choice for anyone.

【Excellent After-Sales Team】: You will receive the 1X Rechargeable Headlamp, 1X USB Cable, Our LED head torch with 2-year replacement service and 7*24 hours customer service. If you have any problem with the rechargeable head torch you received, please let us know and our team will find the best solution for your problem!
